description: A sunrise/sunset widget with golden hour indicator and day length
ui_style: Professional and corporate with structured layouts, neutral tones, and clear data hierarchy.
teacher_code:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, Box, Typography, Stack, Divider, Chip } from '@mui/material';
import response from './response.json';

export default function Widget() {
  const data = response.data;

  return (
    <Card
      sx={{
        width: 'fit-content',
        minWidth: 280,
        maxWidth: 380,
        bgcolor: '#FFFFFF',
        border: `1px solid ${response.meta.primaryColor}`,
        borderRadius: 2,
      }}
      elevation={2}
    >
      <CardContent sx={{ p: 2.5 }}>
        <Stack spacing={2}>
          <Box>
            <Typography variant="h6" fontWeight={600} sx={{ color: response.meta.primaryColor }}>
              {data.location}
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
              Sunrise & Sunset Times
            </Typography>
          </Box>

          <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} />

          <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} justifyContent="space-between">
            <Box>
              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
                Sunrise
              </Typography>
              <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={500}>
                {data.sunrise}
              </Typography>
            </Box>
            <Box>
              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
                Sunset
              </Typography>
              <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={500}>
                {data.sunset}
              </Typography>
            </Box>
          </Stack>

          <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} />

          <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} justifyContent="space-between">
            <Box>
              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
                Golden Hour
              </Typography>
              <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={500}>
                {data.goldenHour.start} - {data.goldenHour.end}
              </Typography>
            </Box>
            <Box>
              <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
                Day Length
              </Typography>
              <Typography variant="body2" fontWeight={500}>
                {data.dayLength}
              </Typography>
            </Box>
          </Stack>
        </Stack>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}
